home.name: Moroni
home.description: Developer with vision... virtual and professional

aboutme.description:
I am a Developer with a passion for technology and a clear focus on creating solutions that make a real impact.

I have worked on national and international projects using tools such as Java, Python, React, and Docker.

Today I combine development with Data Science and Machine Learning, building systems that not only work but also learn and evolve. I am defined by clear communication, leadership, and a strategic vision that goes beyond code.

portfoliov2.description: I redesigned and rebuilt my personal portfolio using React, Tailwind CSS and TypeScript. The new design is modern, responsive and better reflects my professional identity. I implemented smooth navigation, subtle animations and optimized performance to provide an excellent user experience.

portfoliov1.description: My first personal portfolio, built with Angular and hosted on GitHub Pages. This project helped me learn the fundamentals of web development and experiment with different technologies. Although it's a simpler version, it laid the foundation for my growth as a developer and helped me understand the importance of presenting my work well.

feriaproject.description: Project for an online store startup; the project is under development and currently in beta.

inventory.description: Development of an inventory system for a local company, built as a desktop application and used for 3 years.

dwconsulware.description: I specialize in developing and implementing features for a Master Data Management (MDM) solution. My work focuses on ensuring data integrity, accuracy and consistency across multiple systems.

cumorah.description: As a project manager, I lead planning, execution and tracking of multiple projects through all phases. Working closely with a highly skilled team, we focus on development, implementation and continuous improvement of our initiatives. Our goal is to deliver high-quality solutions that meet business objectives.

phcodes.description: I led an agile development team, managing sprints and meeting demanding goals. I developed several APIs in Java for a European company, improving the functionality of a fines management system. I also actively participated in implementing new features, bug fixes and quality assurance across multiple systems.

emunay.description: I actively participated in developing various modules of an ERP system, working on both frontend and backend. I also designed a highly efficient electronic invoicing system, achieving 100% effectiveness in its implementation and use.

cumorahv1.description: I developed and implemented a desktop app for inventory and sales control.
